title: How Stress Hormones Change After 40 and Why It Matters for Your Health
author: Happy Aging Team
meta_title: How Stress Hormones Change After 40 and Why It Matters
meta_description: Stress hormones shift significantly after 40 due to perimenopause and HPA axis changes. Learn how cortisol, DHEA, and adrenaline change, and what to do about it.
